intentSynonyms: add a ui widget to an app in retool
description: Add a UI widget component to a Retool app. Handles Transit JSON manipulation internally — you only need to specify the component type, properties, and position. Common types: TextWidget (markdown text), ButtonWidget2 (button), TextInputWidget (input field), TableWidget2 (data table), SelectWidget (dropdown), NumberInputWidget (number input), CheckboxWidget (checkbox), ContainerWidget (container/frame).

component_type.description: Widget subtype: TextWidget, ButtonWidget2, TextInputWidget, NumberInputWidget, SelectWidget, TableWidget2, CheckboxWidget, ContainerWidget, DateTimeWidget, ImageWidget, JSONExplorerWidget, StatisticWidget

properties.description: Template properties for the widget. TextWidget: { value, format }. ButtonWidget2: { text, styleVariant }. TextInputWidget: { label, placeholder }. TableWidget2: { data }. SelectWidget: { values, labels }.
